name: The Ideal City
overview: Phawanee, an idealistic teacher newly returned from France, uncovers corruption involving her uncle, the town mayor. As she digs deeper, she crosses paths with Naksit, a former politician in hiding after being framed. Together, they fight against powerful forces and systemic injustice in a battle for truth and equality.

trailers.title: อุดมการณ์ของคนรุ่นใหม่ กำลังจะมาเปลี่ยนแปลงสังคม | เมืองแก้ว [Official Trailer]
